image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about registered reports than social media does.
Context visual: Registered reports are research plans peer-reviewed before data collection.
Escalation visual: This means results aren't cherry-picked. Transparency is key.
Evidence visual: Studies show registered reports can reduce bias and improve reproducibility.
Payoff visual: In a world full of misinformation, registered reports shine a light on rigorous science.
Cta visual: Want to explore more about how science works? Like and follow for truth in research!
